name: kospintar
description: SaaS manajemen kos all-in-one via dashboard + WhatsApp

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kospintar/shared build && pnpm --filter @kospintar/api build && pnpm --filter @kospintar/worker build && pnpm --filter @kospintar/scheduler build && pnpm --filter @kospintar/frontend build
